current_chart_value: Janice Harper, a 78-year-old female, has been referred for home health care following her recent surgery for lumbar decompression and fusion at the L5-S1 level, represented by the primary diagnosis of post-surgical care (ICD 10: 798.1). In addition to her primary condition, she is experiencing chronic lumbar pain (M54.5) post-surgery, with notable functional limitations such as reduced motor strength in her right lower extremity, along with tingling and numbness, which further complicate her recovery and mobility.
